structured_payload_candidate.title: Stage Up - Primary-Only Condensing Boiler
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Stage up if unavailable equipment, or Qrequired > 200% B-STAGE MIN of next available stage for 10 min and flow > min flow setpoint, or HWST < setpoint -10°F for 15 min.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
f. Stage up if any of the following is true:
1. Availability Condition: The equipment necessary to operate the current stage are
unavailable. The availability condition is not subject to the minimum stage runtime
requirement. Or
2. Efficiency Condition: Both of the following are true:
i. Qrequired  exceeds 200% of B-STAGE MIN of the next available stage for 10 minutes
ii. Hot water flowrate exceeds the minimum flow setpoint of the next available stage (see
Section 5.21.8 ).
3. Failsafe Condition: HW supply temperature is 1 0°F < setpoint for 15 minutes.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Stage Up - Non-Condensing Boiler
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Stage up if unavailable equipment, or Qrequired > 90% QbX of current stage for 10 min, or HWST < setpoint -10°F for 15 min.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
j. Stage up if any of the following is true:
1. Availability Condition: The equipment necessary to operate the current stage is
unavailable. The availability condition is not subject to the minimum stage runtime
requirement. Or
2. Efficiency Condition: Qrequired  exceeds 90% of the design capacity, QbX, of the boilers in
the current stage for 10 minutes; or
3. Failsafe Condition: HW supply temperature is 10°F < setpoint for 15 minutes.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Stage Down - Hybrid Plant, Current Stage Condensing
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If all boilers in current stage are condensing, stage down if (Qrequired < 110% B-STAGE MIN for 5 min or primary pumps at min speed and primary HWRT > secondary HWRT +3°F for 5 min) AND failsafe not true AND Qrequired < 80% QbX of next lower stage for 5 min.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Current stage active and all boilers enabled in current stage are condensing
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
m. If all boilers enabled in the current stage are condensing, stage down if all of the following are
true:
1. Either:
i. Qrequired  falls below 110% of B-STAGE MIN of the current stage for 5 minutes; or
ii. For 5 minutes, Primary HW pumps are at B -MinPriPumpSpdStage and pr imary HWRT
exceeds secondary HWRT by 3°F.
2. The failsafe stage up condition is not true.
3. Qrequired  is less than 80% of the design capacity, QbX, of the boilers in the next available
lower stage for 5 minutes.

evidence_quote:

structured_payload_candidate.title: Secondary Pump Staging Based on Flow Ratio
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: variable speed secondary pumps serving a loop with a flow meter
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Pumps staged as function of SHWFR = FLOWS / SHWFdesign. Start pump when SHWFR > (Operating Pumps)/(N - 0.03) for 10 min; shut off when SHWFR < (Operating Pumps - 1)/(N - 0.03) for 10 min.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Start next lag pump or shut off last lag pump based on flow conditions.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Secondary HW pumps shall be staged as a function of SHWFR, the ratio of current hot water flow,
FLOW S, to design flow, and the number of pumps, N -SHWP, that operate at design conditions.
Pumps are assumed to be equally sized.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Minimum Flow Bypass Valve Setpoint Calculation
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: primary-only hot water plants with a minimum flow bypass valve
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Calculate HW-MinFlowSP as MinFlowRatio times sum of HW-DesFlowX for operating boilers, where MinFlowRatio = max(HW-MinFlowX/HW-DesFlowX) among operating boilers.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Modulate valve to maintain this setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
a. For th e boilers operating in the stage, identify the boiler with the highest ratio, MinFlowRatio,
of HW -MinFlowX to HW -DesFlowX.
b. Calculate the minimum flow setpoint, HW -MinFlowSP as MinFlowRatio multiplied by the
sum of HW -DesFlowX for the operating boilers.
